stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: In gradient wind the Coriolis force is in balance with the horizontal pressure gradient force and the frictional force
options.b: At the equator horizontal motions do not induce any horizontal Coriolis force
options.c: The Coriolis force is inversely proportional to the sine of latitude
options.d: The Coriolis force is directed in the same sense at all latitudes
